DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA, N.A'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. Dismissal of entire action of all parties and all causes of action filed on January 20, 2016.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA, N.A'S APPLICATION TO ALLOW THOMAS J. MOLONEY TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
